privileged_info_summary: The task involves reassigning patient Timothy Fey from their initial provider (ID 1: Dr. Sarah Admin) to target provider ID 2 (Dr. James Carter) in the NOSH ChartingSystem EHR database. The patient is created with synthetic data (DOB: 1980-01-01, Male) in the demographics table and initially linked to provider ID 1 in the demographics_relate table via setup_task.sh. The target provider James Carter (ID 2) is pre-created in the users table during environment setup. Success verification checks if the demographics_relate table confirms the patient is now linked to provider ID 2.
